title: viola × yurii
intro: Viola × yurii, also known as the hybrid viola, is a rare and unique plant that is a cross between Viola yuriiana and Viola uliginosa. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and aiding in the treatment of infections. Viola × yurii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
